ksa_text: Manage application dependencies and package versions for data projects including dependency specification, vulnerability scanning, upgrade planning, and cross-package compatibility verification.

decision_rationale: Technical Foundations task KSA is within scope for the Data and AI Research Scientist at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
